Dashboard Archive: 2026-07-06 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis - momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two distinctly different momentum profiles at the top of the rankings. ADTTF (#1, score 94.1) shows textbook long-term momentum with extraordinary consistency: 8,799% over 10 years, outperforming SPY by 8,543 percentage points, and passing 4 of 5 momentum ratio tests with all moving averages bullish. In contrast, ATEX (#2) displays explosive recent gains (385.75% over 6 months, 322.81% over 1 year) but shows momentum deterioration at longer timeframes, with 5-year returns of only 71.14% and negative underperformance versus SPY over that period (-4.96%). ADTTF's momentum signal remains clean at -0.05 with a strong_buy flag, suggesting sustained structural strength, while ATEX's momentum ratio degradation (1y_6m at 0.84, 5y_1y at 0.22) indicates the acceleration is decelerating. This represents a classic contrast between secular trend dominance (ADTTF) and cyclical/speculative outperformance (ATEX), with the dashboard's top rank favoring the former.
